author: Priya_Sharma_Mumbai
title: Absolutely love this serum!
text: Been using the Glow Serum for 3 weeks now and my skin has literally transformed. Dark spots are visibly fading and my skin feels so plump. Delivery was quick via BlueDart, arrived in 2 days. Packaging was intact and the product looks 100% genuine. Will definitely repurchase!

author: Rahul_Verma_Delhi
title: Good product but pricey
text: The Vitamin C Face Wash works well. My skin feels clean without being stripped. But at this price point I expected a bigger tube. Delivery by Delhivery took 4 days. Overall satisfied. Order ID: OD-2024-112233

author: Deepika_Nair_Bangalore
title: Best biotin gummies ever!
text: Started taking the Biotin Gummies 60ct two months ago. My hair fall has reduced drastically and my nails are growing stronger. Taste is good too - not too sweet. Fast delivery, came in 3 days via Ekart. Highly recommend for anyone with hair fall issues!

author: Amit_Gupta_Hyderabad
title: Product is okay but delivery was terrible
text: The Hair Growth Oil itself smells nice and feels good on the scalp. But the delivery experience was a nightmare. Delhivery took 9 days! The outer box was completely crushed when it arrived, though the bottle inside was okay. For premium pricing, expect better logistics. Order: OD-2024-223344

author: Sunita_Kapoor_Pune
title: Immunity Boost Powder - game changer!
text: Mix it with warm water every morning and I haven't fallen sick in 2 months! Taste is pleasant, not too sweet. My whole family is now using it. Packaging was secure with a seal inside the box. Delivery was prompt. Definitely buying again.

author: Kavita_Reddy_Chennai
title: Love this sunscreen!
text: Finally found a sunscreen that doesn't leave a white cast on my dusky skin! The SPF50 Sunscreen is lightweight and doesn't pill under makeup. My dermatologist recommended this brand and I'm so glad I tried it. Delivery was super fast - 2 days.
